title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Bayer India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Bayer India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Bayer India Capital India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Kanpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Bayer India Capital India:
Bayer India Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bayer India Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
